title: Club Campestre
shortDescription: A comprehensive club management platform featuring a POS system, real-time member billing, and a mobile app. It includes a custom MCP protocol allowing users to interact naturally with the system via an AI Agent.

details.problemSolved: Most operations—such as processing credit charges, making adjustments, generating account statements, and collecting member information—were done entirely manually, causing delays and administrative bottlenecks.
details.whatWeDid: We built a complete member management and POS system to process consumption across all club areas. The solution includes automated billing, biometric access via HikConnect, and a real-time mobile app for members to check balances and set family PIN limits. Furthermore, we developed a custom MCP protocol, enabling seamless interaction through any AI agent with zero onboarding required.

title: SoyLikes
shortDescription: An innovative mobile app connecting local businesses with content creators, facilitating the exchange of exclusive promotions for effective social media advertising.

details.problemSolved: The client had a visionary idea but needed a technical partner to build it from scratch. Additionally, businesses struggled to find and vet the right influencers for their brands.
details.whatWeDid: We played a key role in product conceptualization and end-to-end development. We built a robust two-sided ecosystem where SoyLikes staff can meticulously curate influencers and connect them with restaurants and businesses, streamlining promotional campaigns and value exchanges.
